Module 1: Your Avatar, Part 1
!
Executive Summary
Your avatar is a composite representation of your ideal client - who is that?
It is very helpful to actually think of your avatar as a real person. You can
even give her/him a name (I recommend this).
Remember, you are always presenting/writing to one person.
At Internet Alchemy (my company) we don’t ever send a “BLAST” to our
list. PLF is all about CONNECTING with your prospects and clients, so
“blasting” them would not make sense - they are people!
Initially I thought it was about creating incredible marketing by connecting
with prospects. But now, I see that it’s about having a greater/stronger
connection using incredible marketing.
So how do you do that? The first step in connecting with them is
understanding them.
This next set of questions will give you the insights you need to create your
offer - they’ll be the fuel for your launch. You need to picture your avatar in
your mind’s eye.
!
!
!

-- 1 of 2 --

The Questions
• 	What’s your avatar’s biggest source of pain?
• 	What keeps them awake at night? What scares your avatar?
• 	What is the biggest danger that they don’t even see yet?
• 	What’s your avatar’s greatest opportunities?
• 	Do they have opportunities that they don’t even know about yet?
• 	What are your avatar’s hopes and dreams?
• 	Who or what do they aspire to be?
• 	Now zoom in on your avatar’s needs...
• 	Why do they want/don’t want _________?
• 	What are the signs they have/don’t have _________?
• 	Did you just learn something about your avatar?
• 	So... for these next questions, really think about your Greatest Case
Study…now or in the future
!
